yeast-and-potato-bread-pastry-lezzet.name: Yeast And Potato Bread Pastry
instructions: 1. Mix the necessary materials for the dough with a rough and stir.
2. A soft consistency dough knead.
3. Close over with a damp cloth and leave 1 hour to swim.
4. Take the dough 12 evenly.
5. Open every bezeyi cake plate size.
6. Do 6 layers of butter on it (excluding the last floor).
7. Cover over with a damp cloth and leave it to rest for 20 minutes.
8. Open the dough with half finger thickness.
9. Mix the grated potatoes, grated white cheese and chopped parley in a bowl to prepare the inner mortar.
10. Spread the half of the potatoes on the dough.
11. 11. Cut strips with three fingers thickness.
12. Start from the edge of each strip and wrap the roll in the way.
12. August Cut the lengths you want.
14 July Apply the same process to other dough.
15. Directory to lubricated tray.
16. Preheated 180 degree cook until fried in the oven.
17. September Serve.

yogurt-and-coconut-cake-teleculinaria.name: Yogurt And Coconut Cake
instructions: Fill a hole with margarine and sprinkle it with flour. Start the oven at 180 degrees. Lay the Greek yoghurts in a bowl, add the yoghurts and sugar and beat it well until you get a cute cream. Then add yeast, flour and grated coconut and beat until homogeneous.

On the other hand, beat the clears into castle and wrap them in the previous preparation. Pour into the shape and put it in the oven for about 40 minutes or until it is well cooked. Stick a toothpick to check, remove it from the oven, deform it and let it cool completely.
Move the cooked condensed milk until it gets creamy and bar the cake. Sprinkle with more grated coconut and serve.

yogurt-beef-argiro.name: Yogurt Beef

ingredients.item: 4 finely chopped tomatoes or 400 g cans
1 mash or lapach or spinach (fat cut)
4 finely chopped tomatoes or 400 g cans
1 mash or lapach or spinach (fat cut)

instructions: Cut the beef with a sharp knife into small bites or stripes.
Sprinkle it with flour (about 2 filled etc.) and mix well to absorb it.
Heat the olive oil in a shallow pot. Shake the meat gently to remove the excess flour, and add it around a medium to strong heat.
Add the chopped onion and set it together for 4–5 minutes.
Add the tomato paste and mix to integrate.
Add the wine and allow the alcohol to evaporate for a few minutes.
Add the spices and chopped tomatoes.
Lower the heat, cover the pot and allow the food to simmer for about 1 hour and 15 minutes, until the meat becomes very tender and melts in the mouth.
Add salt and pepper, depending on the taste.

yummy-pomegranate-vinaigrette-dressing.name: Yummy Pomegranate Vinaigrette Dressing
instructions: Place olive oil, pomegranate juice, rice vinegar, white sugar, shallots, garlic, white pepper, and salt in a blender. Blend until smooth, about 2 minutes.
